response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, GIS) and meets the language proficiency bar (TypeScript, JavaScript, Java, C/C++, C#). However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, or telemetry/metrics infrastructure — the core of this Principal/IC6 role. Title history (Senior/Staff) and scope of impact also fall short of IC6 expectations around multi-team systemic platform leadership.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering experience spanning required languages (JS/TS, Java, C/C++, C#)
Demonstrated systems thinking via low-latency microservices at Sociomantic handling millions of req/sec
Strong craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, teaching/mentoring track record
concerns: No evidence of experimentation, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-automation platform work
Lacks demonstrated Principal/IC6-level cross-team platform leadership and stakeholder influence at scale
No clear data-science/statistical-analysis or metrics-platform experience required for growth measurement
